race.description: Bally Hotel Fishing Club Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: SNITZEL MISS (12) gets a pass mark for her two runs this preparation, both in metropolitan company. She worked home soundly without threatening over 1250m at Canterbury last time and the rise in distance on a bigger track looks ideal at this stage of her campaign. CAPTAIN PEACOCK (4) debuted two-and-a-half weeks ago when he finished fourth over 1300m at this track, beaten 1.4 lengths. Plenty of scope for improvement. Debutante ADAMANTINE (7) has trialled well for the Snowden stable and must be respected, while SOLAR DANCE (11) strips fitter after her first run in nine months and can improve second-up.
